the kolu atlas

The Atlas.

kolu's in-repo knowledge base — authored in markdown/MDX, rendered to self-contained HTML you can read right here in the Code tab. This index is a tree generated from frontmatter: a note nests under its parent, and anything without one is a root — so nothing falls through unfiled.

  • Code browser preview → @kolu/solid-fileview

    budding design

    Invent the grid, slim the house — a Source ⇄ Rendered file-view toggle built on reusable leaf packages. Markdown is the first lit toggle; HTML/SVG next.

  • Code-tab filter strands empty directories

    budding plan

    Why filtering the Code-tab tree left hollow, result-less folders — Pierre's remove promotes an emptied dir to EXPLICIT — and the directoryRemovalOps fix, with the /hickey + /lowy verdict.

  • Electricity — identified, and their progress

    evergreen review

    A tracker for kolu's electricities — infrastructure pulled out from beneath the app into its own thing — and where each stands.

  • Is Mobile Electricity?

    evergreen review

    A Hickey/Lowy review of kolu's mobile support — is mobile an encapsulated change behind a receptacle, or smeared across every consumer measuring the voltage?

  • Phantom running_background — Claude shows "running" forever

    budding plan

    Why the spinner survives a Claude restart — an orphaned background-launch marker has no completion, so the waiting→running_background promotion never decays. Diagnosis + fix.

  • Remote terminals over SSH

    evergreen plan accepted

    The implementation plan for SSH-backed remote terminals (kolu#951) — a TerminalBackend abstraction, a provider-DAG engine, PTY daemonization, an ssh transport, and version/session resilience.

    • R-4 — Local PTY daemon (@kolu/pty-host)

      budding plan

      Design + phases for extracting the PTY host into its own surviving process — a fresh Lowy/Hickey decomposition plus the as-built

      • ChromeBar identity rail — srv · pty

        budding design

        UI prototype for the consolidated connection + build/commit identity rail introduced in R-4 phase A2 — the two-column srv · pty readout, in its final shape from day one.

        • kolu-tui — a CLI terminal client for kolu-server

          seedling design

          A terminal-side client of kolu-server's in-process pty-host — list / attach / spawn from the shell, no browser and no daemon. The CLI face of kolu and the seed of a tmux replacement.

      • kolu-tui — a CLI terminal client for kolu-server

        seedling design

        A terminal-side client of kolu-server's in-process pty-host — list / attach / spawn from the shell, no browser and no daemon. The CLI face of kolu and the seed of a tmux replacement.

  • The kolu Atlas

    budding design proposed

    kolu's second brain — an in-repo, MDX-authored knowledge base in a self-contained Astro project, dogfooded in the Code tab.

    • Cite → open in the Code browser

      seedling plan proposed

      Make <Cite> refs open the cited file in kolu's Code-tab tree (line-highlighted) when a note is previewed inside kolu — wiring three pieces that already exist.

  • Video evidence for PRs

    evergreen design

    Screencast capture + a shared Pages player — the substrate the evidence skill and per-release demos build on. Capture now rides the existing Cucumber harness.

  • Whole-codebase correctness review

    seedling review

    A static audit of path authority, terminal lifecycle, channel cancellation, session-restore fidelity, parser failures, and kill confirmation. Not a style review.

  • Workflow viewer

    budding plan

    Integrating Claude Code dynamic-workflow JSONL into kolu — surfacing fan-out runs on the tile chrome and an Inspector run-list with live timelines.
